creator: mktinapex@yahoo.com
text:
I build a custom kernel because i need dummynet for traffic shaping, so I
added 2 lines options IPFIREWALL and options DUMMYNET and make depend, make,
make install,reboot.

Now when the computer starts in freebsd I got the messages:
g_vfs_done():ad1s2a[READ(offset=8257536, length=4096)error=5
vnode_pager_getpages: I/O read error
vm_fault: pager read error, pid 955 (pkg_info)

when i type pkg_info it returns the message
Segmentation fault: 11 (core dumped)

Now kde doesn`t start, what should i do to resolve this problem ? The ad1s2a
is 200M / and used is 70M. I tried fsck -f and all that and doesn`t dissapear
the error.

tnx
